title: AcousticIngestPacket
description: Stage-1 output from maker:sheet-music (Translator). Captures all metadata produced during source ingestion and score rendering. Consumed by music-teacher (Coach-Producer) in Stage 2.

$schema.description: JSON Schema identifier. Must reference this schema's $id.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this packet schema (e.g. "0.1.0").

packet_id.description: Globally unique ULID identifying this packet instance.

track_id.description: Stable identifier for the track across all stages. Must not change between packets for the same track.

source_files.description: Original source filenames deposited by the user (audio, chord chart, etc.).

mode.description: Scale mode of the tonal center.

camelot_code.description: Camelot Wheel key code (e.g. "8A" for D minor, "1B" for C major). Used for harmonic sequencing in Stage 3.

bpm.description: Detected or user-confirmed tempo in beats per minute.

formats_rendered.description: List of output formats successfully rendered by maker:sheet-music.

duration_seconds.description: Total duration of the track in seconds, if known.

sample_rate_hz.description: Sample rate of the rendered audio (e.g. 44100, 48000), if applicable.

ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of ingestion completion (see docs/data_integrity.md).

revision_token.description: Revision token issued by Coach-Producer on any subsequent edit. null on first emission from Translator.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the Translator about anomalies or assumptions made during ingestion.
